minecraft.note: Join with Minecraft Java 1.21.4. Six landmarks rebuild live, and guide agents answer in chat.

dynamic.cadence: Six landmarks dissolve and rebuild, one block at a time.
dynamic.speed: Rate-limited so the public server stays stable.

recordings.title: Munich Famous Building
recordings.description: A Munich landmark built with visible agent coordination.

recordings.title: Eiffel Tower
recordings.description: A tall landmark build staged from base to tip.

recordings.title: Sydney Opera House
recordings.description: An imported model build with agents on patrol.

recordings.title: Arc de Triomphe
recordings.description: A high-detail model prepared for the museum.

recordings.title: Saint Basil's Cathedral
recordings.description: A colorful landmark with strong visual contrast.

recordings.title: NY Chrysler Building
recordings.description: A skyline model with a full-height rebuild.

landmarks.name: Munich Famous Building
landmarks.description: The central museum build near spawn.

landmarks.name: Eiffel Tower
landmarks.description: The Paris tower rebuilds from the lower frame upward.

landmarks.name: Sydney Opera House
landmarks.description: The Opera House anchors the left side of the museum row.

landmarks.name: Arc de Triomphe
landmarks.description: The arch dissolves from the top and returns from the base.

landmarks.name: Saint Basil's Cathedral
landmarks.description: Colorful domes make this the brightest exhibit.

landmarks.name: NY Chrysler Building
landmarks.description: The tallest exhibit in the landmark row.

agents.name: OpenAI Orchestrator
agents.activity: Introduces the tour and keeps the agents aligned.

agents.name: Design Dora
agents.activity: Watches paths, viewing angles, and visitor flow.

agents.name: Monument Marc
agents.activity: Checks whether each landmark still looks right.

agents.name: Supply Sid
agents.activity: Watches colors, glass, stone, and finishes.

agents.name: Forest Finn
agents.activity: Keeps the grounds and viewing areas tidy.
